item.description: Vice President JD Vance meets with officials from Pakistan, Qatar and Iran for talks in Lucerne, Switzerland as Iran threatened to close down the Strait of Hormuz after Israel’s strikes on Lebanon. NBC News’ Keir Simmons and Gary Grumbach report on President Donald Trump’s intentions to reset relations with Tehran and his threats to attack again if the Hezbollah and Israel conflict escalates.

media:content.media:title: Trump threatens Iran over Hezbollah-Israel conflict as Vance meets delegations in Switzerland
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance meets with officials from Pakistan, Qatar and Iran for talks in Lucerne, Switzerland as Iran threatened to close down the Strait of Hormuz after Israel’s strikes on Lebanon. NBC News’ Keir Simmons and Gary Grumbach report on President Donald Trump’s intentions to reset relations with Tehran and his threats to attack again if the Hezbollah and Israel conflict escalates.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran over Hezbollah-Israel conflict as Vance meets delegations in Switzerland

item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) on Meet the Press slammed President Trump’s new Iran agreement and said he “cannot wait” until leaders such as Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu are “off the world stage.”

media:content.media:title: Cory Booker says ‘we have capitulated to the enemy’ with Trump’s Iran deal: Full interview
media:content.media:description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) on Meet the Press slammed President Trump’s new Iran agreement and said he “cannot wait” until leaders such as Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu are “off the world stage.”

item.title: Cory Booker says ‘we have capitulated to the enemy’ with Trump’s Iran deal: Full interview

item.description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

media:content.media:title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance departed for Switzerland from Joint Base Andrews for U.S.-Iran negotiations, as tensions between Israel and Lebanon remained high. Iran said Saturday that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, citing ceasefire violations after Israel continued deadly strikes in southern Lebanon overnight.

item.title: Vice President JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran negotiations

item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
item.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

media:content.media:text: A sign displays fuel prices at a Mobil gas station
media:content.media:description: A sign displays fuel prices at a Mobil gas station in San Diego on May 4. California gas prices are the highest in the U.S., but they have increased less since the war in Iran began than in most states.

item.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?

item.dc:creator: Megan Shannon
Monica Alba
Dan De Luce
Courtney Kube
item.description: Americans are increasingly down on Trump’s handling of the war the U.S. started with Iran.

media:content.media:text: France's President Emmanuel Macro welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on June 17, 2026.
media:content.media:description: French President Emmanuel Macron welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump signs Iran deal at Versailles.
media:content.media:description: French President Emmanuel Macron welcomes President Donald Trump at Chateau de Versailles on Wednesday.

item.title: Iran peace talks have been chaotic. But confusion has only grown since the agreement was signed.

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Despite a war disrupting its soccer infrastructure, visa issues and travel restrictions, Iran will enter its final game of World Cup group play with a chance to move into the knockout round.

media:content.media:text: Iranian team members celebrate in a huddle
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Amir Ghalenoei looks off while standing on the soccer field inside of a stadium
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

item.title: ‘Part of our culture’: Iran defying hardships and dreaming of first World Cup knockout round appearance

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: “This is the best thing I’ve ever spent my money on,” said one Pennsylvania fan who shelled out $4,000 to take her Egypt-born father to the Egypt vs. Belgium match in Seattle.

media:content.media:text: England v Croatia: Group L - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: England fans celebrate after a 4-2 World Cup win over Croatia in Arlington, Texas, on Wednesday.

item.title: People are surprising their dads with the ultimate Father’s Day gift: World Cup tickets

item.description: Tras un cobro de esquina y una gran comba por parte del futbolista más viral del Mundial, el jugador de la MLS se elevó en el área chica y mandó a guardar la pelota con un letal cabezazo para adelantar a los "All Whites" ante los "Faraones" en Vancouver.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Finn Surman y gran asistencia de Tim Payne! Nueva Zelanda sorprende a Egipto y ya lo gana
media:content.media:description: Tras un cobro de esquina y una gran comba por parte del futbolista más viral del Mundial, el jugador de la MLS se elevó en el área chica y mandó a guardar la pelota con un letal cabezazo para adelantar a los "All Whites" ante los "Faraones" en Vancouver.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Finn Surman y gran asistencia de Tim Payne! Nueva Zelanda sorprende a Egipto y ya lo gana

item.description: El autor del gol de empate, Hélio Varela, comparte que lograron mantener la defensiva y aumentar las oportunidades de gol a la portería de Uruguay, pero cree que el juego bien pudo ganarse.

media:content.media:title: Hélio Varela afirma que la mejora en ofensiva da un resultado satisfactorio
media:content.media:description: El autor del gol de empate, Hélio Varela, comparte que lograron mantener la defensiva y aumentar las oportunidades de gol a la portería de Uruguay, pero cree que el juego bien pudo ganarse.

item.title: Hélio Varela afirma que la mejora en ofensiva da un resultado satisfactorio

item.description: Los expertos analizaron un duelo que podría romper el empate en la cima del grupo. El ganador daría un paso importante rumbo a la siguiente fase y se colocaría como líder en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¿Se define el liderato del grupo en este partido? | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los expertos analizaron un duelo que podría romper el empate en la cima del grupo. El ganador daría un paso importante rumbo a la siguiente fase y se colocaría como líder en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: ¿Se define el liderato del grupo en este partido? | Pasión Mundial

item.description: Uruguay ganaba 2-1 al descanso con goles de Maximiliano Araújo y Agustín Canobbio, pero Hélio Varela aprovechó un error defensivo para sellar el 2-2 definitivo en Miami. // TAGS: TopicTag/Highlights, SportsTeam/Uruguay, SportsTeam/Cape Verde

media:content.media:title: Uruguay deja escapar la victoria y Cabo Verde hace historia
media:content.media:description: Uruguay ganaba 2-1 al descanso con goles de Maximiliano Araújo y Agustín Canobbio, pero Hélio Varela aprovechó un error defensivo para sellar el 2-2 definitivo en Miami. // TAGS: TopicTag/Highlights, SportsTeam/Uruguay, SportsTeam/Cape Verde

item.title: Uruguay deja escapar la victoria y Cabo Verde hace historia

item.description: Nico de la Cruz termina con un sentimiento amargo al no sumar puntos contra Cabo Verde. Explica que buscarán la victoria en el próximo partido, ante una España con jugadores fuertes en lo individual.

media:content.media:title: Nico de la Cruz afirma que el rival no es excusa para la falta de contundencia de Uruguay
media:content.media:description: Nico de la Cruz termina con un sentimiento amargo al no sumar puntos contra Cabo Verde. Explica que buscarán la victoria en el próximo partido, ante una España con jugadores fuertes en lo individual.

item.title: Nico de la Cruz afirma que el rival no es excusa para la falta de contundencia de Uruguay

item.description: Aunque no descansar por encontrar la victoria, Maxi Araújo lamenta no haber alcanzado el resultado. Araújo afirma que el rendimiento de su próximo contrincante no interesa, Uruguay debe ir a ganarlo.

media:content.media:title: Maxi Araújo: “No pudimos cuidar el resultado y terminamos sufriendo un poco”
media:content.media:description: Aunque no descansar por encontrar la victoria, Maxi Araújo lamenta no haber alcanzado el resultado. Araújo afirma que el rendimiento de su próximo contrincante no interesa, Uruguay debe ir a ganarlo.

item.title: Maxi Araújo: “No pudimos cuidar el resultado y terminamos sufriendo un poco”

item.description: Tras el empate ante Cabo Verde, Marcelo Bielsa reconoció que Uruguay perdió el control del partido en varios momentos. La selección celeste suma apenas dos puntos de seis posibles y se jugará su clasificación en la última jornada.

media:content.media:title: Marcelo Bielsa: "Cedimos el protagonismo" tras otro empate de Uruguay
media:content.media:description: Tras el empate ante Cabo Verde, Marcelo Bielsa reconoció que Uruguay perdió el control del partido en varios momentos. La selección celeste suma apenas dos puntos de seis posibles y se jugará su clasificación en la última jornada.

item.title: Marcelo Bielsa: "Cedimos el protagonismo" tras otro empate de Uruguay

item.description: El entrenador Leitão alza la manos para celebrar el empate de Cabo Verde y da indicaciones al portero Vozinha. El banquillo corre al autor del gol, Hélio Varela, para alzarlo en un festejo con todo el equipo.

media:content.media:title: ¡Cabo Verde sigue con vida! Leitão da indicaciones a Vozinha y banquillo festeja con Varela
media:content.media:description: El entrenador Leitão alza la manos para celebrar el empate de Cabo Verde y da indicaciones al portero Vozinha. El banquillo corre al autor del gol, Hélio Varela, para alzarlo en un festejo con todo el equipo.

item.title: ¡Cabo Verde sigue con vida! Leitão da indicaciones a Vozinha y banquillo festeja con Varela

item.description: Un error en la salida de Mathías Olivera le permitió a Hélio Varela recuperar el balón y definir con precisión para empatar 2-2 el partido entre Cabo Verde y Uruguay.

media:content.media:title: Cabo Verde aprovecha un error y silencia a Uruguay
media:content.media:description: Un error en la salida de Mathías Olivera le permitió a Hélio Varela recuperar el balón y definir con precisión para empatar 2-2 el partido entre Cabo Verde y Uruguay.

item.title: Cabo Verde aprovecha un error y silencia a Uruguay

item.description: Miami se encendió con el duelo entre Uruguay y Cabo Verde. Los fans vibraron con cada gol en las tribunas, convirtiendo el estadio en una fiesta con cánticos, banderas y emoción.

media:content.media:title: ¡Fiesta en Miami!: así se gritan los goles entre Uruguay y Cabo Verde
media:content.media:description: Miami se encendió con el duelo entre Uruguay y Cabo Verde. Los fans vibraron con cada gol en las tribunas, convirtiendo el estadio en una fiesta con cánticos, banderas y emoción.

item.title: ¡Fiesta en Miami!: así se gritan los goles entre Uruguay y Cabo Verde

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
Amina Kilpatrick
Jeremy Mikula
item.description: Vice President JD Vance held talks with Iranian officials Sunday in Switzerland, with the days-old peace deal at risk.

media:content.media:text: Vice President J.D. Vance speaks in the briefing room at the White House on June 18, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Vice President J.D. Vance speaks in the briefing room at the White House on June 18, 2026.

media:content.media:text: India Temporarily Blocks Telegram App Over Medical Exam Fraud
media:content.media:description: The Indian government banned the Telegram messaging app following the leak of a recent medical exam paper.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: “Oliver is now back in California where he can finally rest,” said a post on his social media accounts. Six people died when two helicopters collided June 14, authorities have said.

media:content.media:text: Oliver Tree performing onstage.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

media:content.media:text: Charred vehicles seen from an overhead, aerial perspective.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

media:content.media:text: Oliver Tree performing onstage.
media:content.media:description: Oliver Tree performing at the BottleRock Napa Valley Festival in Napa, Calif., in 2024.

item.title: Singer Oliver Tree’s body back in California after helicopter crash in Brazil

item.description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

media:content.media:title: Vance holds White House press briefing
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as Vice President JD Vance holds a press briefing at the White House.

item.title: Vance holds White House press briefing

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: “Oliver is now back in California where he can finally rest,” said a post on his social media accounts. Six people died when two helicopters collided June 14, authorities have said.

item.title: Singer Oliver Tree’s body back in California after helicopter crash in Brazil

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Despite a war disrupting its soccer infrastructure, visa issues and travel restrictions, Iran will enter its final game of World Cup group play with a chance to move into the knockout round.

media:content.media:text: Iranian team members celebrate in a huddle
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Amir Ghalenoei looks off while standing on the soccer field inside of a stadium
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran, right, celebrates scoring a goal with teammates before it was disallowed for offside during Iran's World Cup group match against Belgium on Sunday.

item.title: ‘Part of our culture’: Iran defying hardships and dreaming of first World Cup knockout round appearance

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: After a highly criticized World Cup debut, Spain’s Mikel Oyarzabal returned to Atlanta Stadium with a vengeance on Sunday

media:content.media:text: Mikel Oyarzabal pumps both fists in the air in celebration.
media:content.media:description: Mikel Oyarzabal of Spain celebrating after scoring his team's third goal against Saudi Arabia in Atlanta on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Mikel Oyarzabal shoots toward the goal during a world cup match.
media:content.media:description: Mikel Oyarzabal of Spain celebrating after scoring his team's third goal against Saudi Arabia in Atlanta on Sunday.

item.title: Mikel Oyarzabal leads Spain to victory with two goals in 4-0 win over Saudi Arabia

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: The Austrian-Canadian billionaire, 93, was accused of incidents involving seven complainants and pleaded not guilty to 12 charges.

media:content.media:text: Frank stronach, outside a courthouse.
media:content.media:description: Frank Stronach, who had been accused of incidents involving seven complainants and pleaded not guilty to 12 charges, departing a Toronto courthouse on Friday.

item.title: Canadian auto parts magnate Frank Stronach found guilty of sexual assault
